$comment: Shipped <assert.h> macro injection — the FIRST consumer of the descriptor `macros` surface. The preprocessor resolves `#include <assert.h>` to shippedLibs/assert.json and splices a synthetic `#define assert(e) ((void)0)` into the synth buffer (span-valid replacement). The assert is FALSE (x==99, x==42); a no-op leaves control flow intact → exit 42. RED-on-disable: without the injection, `assert` is undeclared → compile fails. The release arm confirms the full shipped pipeline.
